adHighCpu.description: Triggers high cpu load in the ad service

adManualGc.description: Triggers full manual garbage collections in the ad service

emailMemoryLeak.description: Memory leak in the email service.

failedReadinessProbe.description: readiness probe failure for cart service

imageSlowLoad.description: slow loading images in the frontend

kafkaQueueProblems.description: Overloads Kafka queue while simultaneously introducing a consumer side delay leading to a lag spike

llmGuardrailLlmJudge.description: MANDATE-06 L2 guardrail: Bedrock LLM-as-judge classifier for product-reviews tool results and shopping-copilot user input (fail-closed, off by default — was referenced in code but never registered here)

llmInaccurateResponse.description: LLM returns an inaccurate product summary for product ID L9ECAV7KIM

llmReviewsModelRouting.description: ADR-004: product-reviews model routing, kept separate from copilot's llmModelRouting A/B flag so copilot's Nova Pro experiment can never leak Pro-priced traffic into the high-volume reviews path

llmRateLimitError.description: LLM intermittently returns a rate limit error

llmReviewsCacheEnabled.description: Enable or disable LLM reviews cache bypass

llmReviewsFallbackEnabled.description: Enable Nova Micro fallback routing for product-reviews summaries when primary model fails

llmSemanticSimilarityGuard.description: MANDATE-06 L1 guardrail: Titan Embed Text v2 cosine-similarity vs known-attack corpus (mentor 16/07), covers both the static corpus check and copilot's session-history semantic-repetition check. Off until threshold + p95 latency are measured.

loadGeneratorFloodHomepage.description: Flood the frontend with a large amount of requests.

paymentFailure.description: Fail payment service charge requests n%

productCatalogFailure.description: Fail product catalog service on a specific product
